title: Sunflower Lattice Gas — Cross-w Sweep (w = 2, 3, 4)
framework: Prima Materia Framework (PMF) — Layer 2: Arithmetic Phase (Boolean lattice gas)
motivation: The conjecture asserts that the extremal family size is bounded by c_k^w where c_k depends only on k (not w). Testing this requires varying w at fixed k. Previous run (001) covered w=3 only; this run adds w=2 (full saturation observed) and w=4 (up to n=7).

w=4.note: n=8 attempted but aborted at 5 minutes of runtime; C(8,4)=70 subsets pushes the exhaustive enumeration beyond session budget. M(n=7, w=4, k=3)=15 is a strict LOWER bound on M(infty, w=4, k=3).

c_k_estimate.method: For each w, treat observed M(large-n, w, 3) as a lower bound on the extremal. The conjecture asserts extremal <= c_3^w. Thus c_3 >= M^(1/w) from the measurement.

per_w.note: exact — full saturation confirmed across n=6..10
two-point agreement; needs n=9 to confirm
n=7 only; M could be larger at n>=8

c_k_estimate.observation: The w=2 saturated lower bound gives c_3 >= sqrt(6) ~ 2.449. The w=3 (tentative) and w=4 (unsaturated) lower bounds are weaker. The sequence (2.449, 2.289, 1.968) is monotone decreasing but each entry is itself a lower bound on the true c_3 estimate, so the monotone decrease is not informative about the conjecture. What IS informative: c_3 > 2 is established from w=2 alone. The classical guess c_3 = 2 is ruled out by our measurement.
c_k_estimate.weak_claim: Data consistent with c_3 being bounded above by some absolute constant; nothing in this run forces c_3 to grow with w.

w2_extremal_identification.extremal_construction: Two vertex-disjoint triangles in a 6-vertex graph. Max degree = 2 (no 3-claw), matching number = 2 (no matching of size 3). |E| = 6.
w2_extremal_identification.proof_sketch: SF-free for w=2 means the graph has no 3-sunflower = no 3-claw AND no 3-matching. Any graph with max-degree <= 2 and matching <= 2 has |E| <= 6. Two disjoint triangles achieves this bound. This matches the standard extremal graph-theory result.
w2_extremal_identification.status: consistent with known extremal result; this run recovers it via enumeration

source_code: sunflower_transfer_matrix.cpp (modified: growth-rate cap lowered from num_subsets<=56 to num_subsets<=35 to skip the infeasible n=8 w=3 growth-rate computation)
